examples.title: Algorithm: Activity Lifecycle
examples.description: Demonstrates the sequence of callback methods in an Activity lifecycle
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ActivityLifecycle
INPUT: none
OUTPUT: none

BEGIN
 onCreate()
 onStart()
 onResume()
 onPause()
 onStop()
 onDestroy()
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode illustrates the sequence of callback methods in an Activity lifecycle. Each method is called at a specific point in the Activity's life cycle, allowing for initialization, resource management, and cleanup.

examples.title: Java: Activity Lifecycle
examples.description: Demonstrates the implementation of an Activity lifecycle in Java
examples.explanation: This Java code demonstrates the implementation of an Activity lifecycle. Each callback method is overridden to perform specific actions at different points in the Activity's life cycle.

examples.title: Java: Saving Activity State
examples.description: Demonstrates how to save and restore an Activity's state in Java
examples.explanation: This Java code demonstrates how to save and restore an Activity's state using the onSaveInstanceState() method and the onCreate() method.
